text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still worried about Mayano Top Gun's low spirits
a few months after her debut, I bring her to a
racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When we arrive, she explains that the races she's
run in are much more boring than she had
imagined.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To help with her dissatisfaction, I decide to have
her run in races that will allow her natural skills to
shine.
